form.label: Compliance - Local Users Review
form.description: Annual local user account compliance review. Baselines managed in GitLab by team.

search.query: index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="custom:automation_local_user_group_audit:logs" | spath input=_raw path=department output=department | stats count by department | fields department

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="custom:automation_local_user_group_audit:logs" | spath input=_raw path=department output=department | spath input=_raw path=config output=config | where department="$filter_dept$" OR "$filter_dept$"="*" | stats count by config | fields config

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="custom:automation_local_user_group_audit:logs" | spath input=_raw path=department output=department | spath input=_raw path=config output=config | spath input=_raw path=hostname output=hostname | where (department="$filter_dept$" OR "$filter_dept$"="*") AND (config="$filter_config$" OR "$filter_config$"="*") | stats count by hostname | fields hostname

index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="custom:automation_local_user_group_audit:logs" | spath input=_raw path=hostname output=Host | spath input=_raw path=department output=Department | spath input=_raw path=config output=Config | spath input=_raw path=additional_users{} output=additional_users_mv | spath input=_raw path=missing_users{} output=missing_users_mv | spath input=_raw path=locked_accounts{} output=locked_accounts_mv | spath input=_raw path=expired_accounts{} output=expired_accounts_mv | spath input=_raw path=interactive_accounts{} output=interactive_accounts_mv | spath input=_raw path=baseline_accounts{} output=baseline_accounts_mv | spath input=_raw path=config_baseline_file output=config_file | spath input=_raw path=host_override_file output=host_file | where (Host="$filter_host$" OR "$filter_host$"="*") AND (Config="$filter_config$" OR "$filter_config$"="*") AND (Department="$filter_dept$" OR "$filter_dept$"="*") | eval "Additional Users" = if(isnull(mvjoin(additional_users_mv, ", ")) OR mvjoin(additional_users_mv, ", ")="", "-", mvjoin(additional_users_mv, ", ")) | eval "Missing Users" = if(isnull(mvjoin(missing_users_mv, ", ")) OR mvjoin(missing_users_mv, ", ")="", "-", mvjoin(missing_users_mv, ", ")) | eval "Locked" = if(isnull(mvjoin(locked_accounts_mv, ", ")) OR mvjoin(locked_accounts_mv, ", ")="", "-", mvjoin(locked_accounts_mv, ", ")) | eval "Expired" = if(isnull(mvjoin(expired_accounts_mv, ", ")) OR mvjoin(expired_accounts_mv, ", ")="", "-", mvjoin(expired_accounts_mv, ", ")) | eval "Interactive" = if(isnull(mvjoin(interactive_accounts_mv,", ")) OR mvjoin(interactive_accounts_mv,", ")="", "-", mvjoin(interactive_accounts_mv,", ")) | eval "Baseline Accounts" = if(isnull(mvjoin(baseline_accounts_mv, ", ")) OR mvjoin(baseline_accounts_mv, ", ")="", "-", mvjoin(baseline_accounts_mv, ", ")) | eval "Baseline File" = config_file + if(host_file="none" OR isnull(host_file), "", " + " + host_file) | join type=left Host [ search index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" | sort _time | dedup hostname | eval "Review Status" = decision + " — " + reviewed_by + " (" + strftime(_time, "%d/%m/%Y") + ")" | table hostname "Review Status" | rename hostname as Host ] | eval "Review Status" = coalesce('Review Status', "Pending") | dedup Host | sort Department Config Host | table Host Department Config "Additional Users" "Missing Users" Locked Expired Interactive "Baseline Accounts" "Baseline File" "Review Status"

div.p: Click any row in the table above to select a host for review.

search.query: index=automation_local_user_group_audit sourcetype="user_audit_signoff" event_type="audit_signoff" | eval "Signed Off At" = strftime(_time, "%d %b %Y %H:%M:%S") | table "Signed Off At" hostname reviewed_by audit_year decision remarks | rename hostname as "Host" reviewed_by as "Reviewed By" audit_year as "Year" decision as "Decision" remarks as "Remarks" | sort -"Signed Off At"
